category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to the Mozambique market (INNOQ conformity adopting NM/EN 149 FFP, Portuguese-language documentation, occupational-safety framework, import inspection, registered importer).

title.en: China-to-Mozambique PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入莫桑比克（INNOQ）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入莫三比克（INNOQ）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Mozambique market requirements: INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade) conformity adopting NM/EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), Portuguese-language documentation, the occupational-safety framework, import-inspection/registered-importer obligations, and the PPE-vs-medical-mask boundary handled by the national health regulator.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与莫桑比克市场要求对照，涵盖INNOQ（国家标准化与质量研究所）采纳NM/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的合格评定、葡萄牙语文件、职业安全框架、进口检验/登记进口商义务，以及由国家卫生监管机构处理的PPE与医用口罩界定。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與莫三比克市場要求對照，涵蓋INNOQ（國家標準化與質量研究所）採納NM/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的合格評定、葡萄牙語文件、職業安全框架、進口檢驗/登記進口商義務，以及由國家衛生監管機構處理的PPE與醫用口罩界定。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Mozambique's standards and conformity framework administered by INNOQ evolves, and import-inspection practice at Maputo, Beira, and Nacala may vary. Exporters, importers, and registered local importers should verify current Mozambican standards, INNOQ adoption status of NM/EN 149, Portuguese-language documentation requirements, and occupational-safety and health-regulator rules with qualified Mozambican regulatory professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。莫桑比克由INNOQ管理的标准与合格评定框架会变化，马普托、贝拉及纳卡拉口岸的进口检验实践也可能不同。出口商、进口商及当地登记进口商在出货前，应与合格的莫桑比克法规专业人士核验现行莫桑比克标准、INNOQ对NM/EN 149的采纳情况、葡萄牙语文件要求，以及职业安全与卫生监管机构规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。莫三比克由INNOQ管理的標準與合格評定框架會變化，馬普托、貝拉及納卡拉口岸的進口檢驗實踐也可能不同。出口商、進口商及當地登記進口商在出貨前，應與合格的莫三比克法規專業人士核驗現行莫三比克標準、INNOQ對NM/EN 149的採納情況、葡萄牙語文件要求，以及職業安全與衛生監管機構規則。

answer_first.en: Filtering respirators entering Mozambique are typically assessed against Mozambican national standards (NM) that adopt EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), under conformity and import-inspection oversight by INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade). Documentation must generally be provided in Portuguese, a registered local importer is needed, and occupational-use respirators sit within the national occupational-safety framework, while medical/surgical masks fall to the national health regulator. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not by themselves satisfy the NM/EN 149 route adopted in Mozambique.
answer_first.zh: 进入莫桑比克的过滤式呼吸器通常依据采纳EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的莫桑比克国家标准（NM）进行评定，由INNOQ（国家标准化与质量研究所）实施合格评定与进口检验监管。文件一般须提供葡萄牙语版本，须有当地登记进口商，职业用呼吸器纳入国家职业安全框架，而医用/外科口罩归国家卫生监管机构。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告本身不满足莫桑比克采纳的NM/EN 149路径。
answer_first.zht: 進入莫三比克的過濾式呼吸器通常依據採納EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的莫三比克國家標準（NM）進行評定，由INNOQ（國家標準化與質量研究所）實施合格評定與進口檢驗監管。文件一般須提供葡萄牙語版本，須有當地登記進口商，職業用呼吸器納入國家職業安全框架，而醫用/外科口罩歸國家衛生監管機構。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告本身不滿足莫三比克採納的NM/EN 149路徑。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred; INNOQ, Mozambican government gazette (Boletim da Republica), and EUR-Lex/CEN official URLs are preferred primary sources. Local PDFs are not accepted.
